selected_issues.title: [billwatch] EIA API v2 integration — residential electricity rate data for benchmarking and state pages
selected_issues.reason: P1 REVENUE ENABLER — CONTINUE WIP. PR #372 merged partial EIA integration (typed client, caching layer). 50-state SEO pages are live but show only informational content without real rate data. Completing the EIA API integration enables benchmarking ('your rate is 23% above state average') which is the conversion trigger for energy switching affiliate CTAs. Free government API, typed client partially built in main. Revenue path: real data → benchmarking → 'you're overpaying' → energy switching affiliate CTAs. This is BillWatch's shortest path to revenue conversion on existing SEO pages.

selected_issues.title: [afterloss] Curate subscription cancellation templates (100+ services)
selected_issues.reason: P2 REVENUE PIPELINE — CONTINUE WIP. PR #374 merged partial cancellation template work into main. CRITICAL DEPENDENCY: completing this unblocks #293 (cancellation SEO pages, P1), which creates /cancel/{service} pages targeting high-intent searches like 'how to cancel [service] after death'. Each cancellation page embeds affiliate links for identity protection and legal services. Content curation task with high autonomous completion probability. Revenue path: templates → #293 SEO pages → affiliate links → revenue. AfterLoss's clearest non-escalated revenue path.

selected_issues.title: [ghostboard] Database schema — companies, reports, stats, user profiles, subscriptions
selected_issues.reason: P0 SCAFFOLD — FRESH PICK, NEW PRODUCT. GhostBoard has 0 RALPH PRs merged — entirely untouched. This P0 DB schema unblocks ALL ghostboard revenue: #140 (core MVP), #144 (landing page + SEO), #149 (dashboard), #305 (affiliate links), #306 (recruiter signup), #307 (Stripe subscription). GhostBoard targets 10M+ job seekers/yr with 'Does [company] ghost applicants' SEO — massive search intent. DB schema is a well-scoped task (Supabase migrations + types) that autonomous workers handle reliably. PORTFOLIO DIVERSIFICATION: afterloss (28 PRs) and billwatch (18 PRs) are maturing — time to open a third revenue front. Anti-pattern acknowledged: we're not abandoning focus, just planting a seed while the other two products continue on their revenue paths.

housekeeping.reason: ORCHESTRATE CYCLE 36 (2026-03-19 16:15 UTC): 2 WIP CONTINUATIONS + 1 NEW PRODUCT. #331 (billwatch EIA API) and #256 (afterloss cancellation templates) continue as WIP — both had partial PRs merged last cycle and need completion. FRESH PICK: #272 (ghostboard DB schema) opens a third product front. GhostBoard has 0 PRs and targets 10M+ job seekers. DB schema is the P0 blocker for the entire product. NOTE: #337 (seasonal SEO) already has open PR #375 from last cycle's worker — flagged for review, not re-assigned. STRATEGY: 1 billwatch (revenue enabler) + 1 afterloss (pipeline unblock) + 1 ghostboard (new product seed). Both afterloss and billwatch are maturing with comprehensive SEO portfolios — opening ghostboard now is the right portfolio diversification move.
